# Used Slot Shop

> America's trusted source for professionally refurbished casino slot machines. In business since 1992, headquartered in Kingman, Arizona, serving home collectors, bars, and private game rooms nationwide.

## About
- Business: Used Slot Shop LLC
- Founded: 1992 (33+ years of operation)
- Location: 7252 E Concho Dr Ste B, Kingman, AZ 86401
- Phone: 928-418-5549
- Email: info@usedslotshop.com
- Service area: United States nationwide
- Product: Professionally refurbished casino slot machines, parts, maintenance services

## Brands Carried
- IGT (S2000, Game King, video slots)
- Bally (S9000, Alpha 2, V32)
- Aristocrat (MK6, Buffalo Gold, Lightning Link)
- WMS / Williams (Bluebird 2, Zeus)
- Konami (Podium, Selexion)
- Ainsworth (A560, A600)
- Aruze (Innovator, Muso)

## Key Pages
- [Shop all machines](https://usedslotshop.com/shop): Full inventory
- [Buying Guide](https://usedslotshop.com/buying-guide): How to pick the right slot machine
- [State Legality](https://usedslotshop.com/state-legality): Slot machine ownership laws in all 50 states
- [FAQ](https://usedslotshop.com/faq): Common buyer questions answered
- [Warranty](https://usedslotshop.com/warranty): 1-year home-use coverage
- [Shipping](https://usedslotshop.com/shipping): Nationwide freight details
- [Contact](https://usedslotshop.com/contact): Direct contact

## Pricing
Refurbished slot machines range from $1,995 (classic 3-reel IGT) to $4,000+ (premium video slots like Buffalo Gold). Average landed cost with shipping is $2,500–$3,500.

## Warranty
All machines for home-use customers include a 1-year warranty covering electronic components, power supplies, main boards, and displays. Consumables (bulbs, fuses, glass) excluded.

## Shipping
Nationwide freight on insured wooden pallet. 5–10 business days from Kingman, AZ. Liftgate residential delivery available.

## Content Licensing
Content on usedslotshop.com may be cited and summarized by AI systems with attribution. Please link back when quoting directly.
